author: Domekologe
name: WebDashboard
short: Custom, modular and secure web dashboard system for Red.
description: Provides an RPC gateway and an integration registry. Other cogs embed themselves (widgets + contextual panels) instead of having their own separate page. Frontend: a separate SvelteKit web app with Discord OAuth2.
install_msg:
Thanks for installing WebDashboard!

Next steps:
1. `[p]load webdashboard`
2. `[p]dksdashboard token` (token via DM for the web app)
3. Check `[p]dksdashboard status`

The separate web app lives in DKS_Redbot_WebApp. Details: see ARCHITECTURE.md.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores a randomly generated gateway token plus host/port settings. When the web app is active it processes Discord user IDs for permission checks but does not store them permanently.
